channel.title: Clarissa Ch'ng on clarissa
channel.description: Recent content in Clarissa Ch'ng on clarissa

item.title: about me
item.description: nice to meet you, i’m clarissa CLARISSA CH’NG SI-EN | 庄思恩 Born in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. Currently a comp sci student at university of bristol. I’m currenlty looking for oppotunities in the field! Still have many things to explore, learn and venture! what i’m passionate about? technology story arts i’m equipped with… front-end: html, css, hugo, yml, json back-end: phython, c, haskell, java languages: English, Chinese, Bahasa Malaysia,
